description: Detects excessive imports, parameter overload, and low class cohesion in JavaScript. Simplified from Rust: flags all import_statement nodes (without counting against threshold >15) and all formal_parameters nodes with 6+ parameters (without threshold check). Low cohesion (no `this` access) not detectable in JSON DSL. Language scoped to javascript only.

flag.message: import statement detected -- if the total exceeds 15, consider splitting into smaller modules to reduce coupling
